violations.text: The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Proper storage reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be broken down and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

Persons unnecessary to the food establishment (baby) were observed in the food preparation, food storage, and/or warewashing areas. PIC moved baby. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

Various foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, allergens, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Ice Scoop moved to protected location at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The bucket used for transferring ice from the ice machine to the front ice well was observed not stored inverted. Ice bucket is to be store inverted for proper air drying after uses. Ice bucket moved to dish area at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
